entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop studied for LLS resistance

entities.name: LLS RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to leaf spot disease in groundnut

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A GWAS performed to identify genetic loci associated with LLS resistance traits

entities.name: MAGIC POPULATION
entities.description: An eight-way multiparent advanced generation intercross population of groundnut

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: Natural environment where LLS resistance traits were recorded

entities.name: LIGHT CHAMBER
entities.description: Controlled environment where LLS resistance traits were recorded

entities.name: AXIOM ARACHIS ARRAY
entities.description: An Affymetrix 48 K single-nucleotide polymorphism (SNP) array used for genotyping

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with the variation of quantitative traits

entities.name: INCUBATION PERIOD
entities.description: A component trait of LLS resistance measuring the time from infection to symptom appearance

entities.name: LATENT PERIOD
entities.description: A component trait of LLS resistance measuring the time from infection to spore production

entities.name: A-SUBGENOME
entities.description: One of the two subgenomes of the allotetraploid groundnut

entities.name: B-SUBGENOME
entities.description: One of the two subgenomes of the allotetraploid groundnut

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Statistical associations between genetic markers and phenotypic traits

entities.name: LLS SCORES
entities.description: Quantitative scores used to measure the severity of leaf spot disease

entities.name: AREA UNDER THE DISEASE PROGRESSION CURVE
entities.description: AUDPC, a measure of disease intensity over time

entities.name: CHROMOSOME A05
entities.description: A specific chromosome in the A-subgenome where MTAs were identified

entities.name: CHROMOSOME B07
entities.description: A specific chromosome in the B-subgenome where MTAs were identified

entities.name: CHROMOSOME B09
entities.description: A specific chromosome in the B-subgenome where MTAs were identified

entities.name: GENIC SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms located within genes

entities.name: LRR RECEPTOR-LIKE PROTEIN KINASES
entities.description: Proteins encoded by genes associated with disease resistance

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins that contribute to the plant's ability to resist pathogens

relationships.target: AREA UNDER THE DISEASE PROGRESSION CURVE
